reviews.comment:
Pésimo playero.. le dio mi Serviclub a otro vehículo y la perdí y encima no me cargó los puntos.. y quería desconocer todo el hecho y no me quería dar su nombre ni apellido.. Polo Ramos Jesús dijo que se llamaba..

(Translated by Google)
Terrible gas station attendant... he gave my Serviclub card to another vehicle and I lost it, and on top of that, he didn't credit my points... and he wanted to deny the whole thing and wouldn't give me his first or last name... He said his name was Polo Ramos Jesús...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBc2FHVTlRRRAB
